title: Best robot vacuum deal: Save $210 on Eufy Omni C20
excerpt: This robot vacuums and mops your floors at the push of a button.
content_html:
SAVE $210: As of July 23, the Eufy Omni C20 is on sale for $339.99 at Amazon. That's a 38% discount on the list price.

Credit: eufy

$339.99 at Amazon
$549.99 Save $210

Robot vacuums have come a long way from simply picking up bits of dust and crumbs. Newer models can now handle everything from vacuuming to mopping. Most even handle their own cleaning and maintenance, removing further work for you. One such model is the Eufy Omni C20, which is on sale as of July 23. Usually priced at $549.99, you can take it home for $339.99.

For picking up dirt, this robot vacuum uses BoostIQ technology to automatically adjust suction up to 7,000Pa across carpets and hard floors, helping remove dirt, crumbs, and even pet hair. Its Pro-Detangle Comb helps loosen hair caught around the roller brush during cleaning, saving you from having to detangle it by hand. And as it measures just 3.35 inches (85mm) tall, the robot can reach under low furniture, picking up dirt you might miss with a manual or cordless vacuum.

Mashable Deals

By signing up, you agree to receive recurring automated SMS marketing messages from Mashable Deals at the number provided. Msg and data rates may apply. Up to 2 messages/day. Reply STOP to opt out, HELP for help. Consent is not a condition of purchase. See our Privacy Policy and Terms of Use.

It runs for up to 132 minutes on Standard mode before automatically returning to the dock to recharge. Once it's done, it will return to where it left off and resume cleaning.

You don't even need to tell it where to go; the iPath Laser Navigation helps it map efficient routes and store up to three floor maps for multi-level homes. Plus, you can control everything through the Eufy Clean app. Use it to set schedules, create No-Go Zones, and select room or zone cleaning modes.

Mashable Deals

By signing up, you agree to receive recurring automated SMS marketing messages from Mashable Deals at the number provided. Msg and data rates may apply. Up to 2 messages/day. Reply STOP to opt out, HELP for help. Consent is not a condition of purchase. See our Privacy Policy and Terms of Use.

Head to Amazon to grab this great robot vacuum deal.

content_html_zh:
节省 210 美元：自 7 月 23 日起，Eufy Omni C20 在亚马逊上的售价为 339.99 美元。 这比标价有 38% 的折扣。

图片来源：eufy

亚马逊 339.99 美元 549.99 美元 节省 210 美元

机器人真空吸尘器已经从简单地吸起灰尘和碎屑而走过了漫长的道路。 较新的型号现在可以处理从吸尘到拖地的所有事情。 大多数甚至可以自行进行清洁和维护，从而为您省去更多工作。 其中一款型号是 Eufy Omni C20，已于 7 月 23 日开始销售。 通常售价为 549.99 美元，您只需 339.99 美元即可带回家。

为了吸起污垢，这款机器人真空吸尘器采用 BoostIQ 技术，可在地毯和硬地板上自动调节吸力高达 7,000Pa，帮助清除污垢、碎屑，甚至宠物毛发。 它的 Pro-Detangle Comb 有助于在清洁过程中松开滚刷周围的毛发，使您无需手动梳理它。 由于该机器人的高度仅为 3.35 英寸（85 毫米），因此它可以到达低矮的家具下方，捡起手动或无线吸尘器可能漏掉的污垢。

混搭优惠

注册即表示您同意按照提供的号码接收来自 Mashable Deals 的定期自动 SMS 营销消息。 消息和数据速率可能适用。 每天最多 2 条消息。 回复 STOP 可选择退出，回复 HELP 寻求帮助。 同意不是购买的条件。 请参阅我们的隐私政策和使用条款。

它在标准模式下运行长达 132 分钟，然后自动返回底座充电。 完成后，它将返回到上次停止的位置并继续清洁。

你甚至不需要告诉它去哪里； iPath 激光导航可帮助其绘制高效路线，并为多层住宅存储多达三层的楼层地图。 另外，您可以通过 Eufy Clean 应用程序控制一切。 用它来设置时间表、创建禁区以及选择房间或区域清洁模式。

混搭优惠

注册即表示您同意按照提供的号码接收来自 Mashable Deals 的定期自动 SMS 营销消息。 消息和数据速率可能适用。 每天最多 2 条消息。 回复 STOP 可选择退出，回复 HELP 寻求帮助。 同意不是购买的条件。 请参阅我们的隐私政策和使用条款。

前往亚马逊购买这款扫地机器人超值优惠。
